testcase.name: test_mobile_flow[TC001-Verify app launch displays splash screen]
test_mobile_flow[TC002-Verify splash logo presence and styling]
test_mobile_flow[TC003-Verify redirect to Home/Landing page after splash]
test_mobile_flow[TC004-Verify network handshake on launch]
test_mobile_flow[TC005-Verify app configuration settings fetch]
test_mobile_flow[TC006-Verify telemetry module initialization]
test_mobile_flow[TC007-Verify offline DB status check on splash]
test_mobile_flow[TC008-Verify splash screen displays correct branding]
test_mobile_flow[TC009-Verify launch performance meets acceptable thresholds]
test_mobile_flow[TC010-Verify splash screen behaves correctly on orientation lock]
test_mobile_flow[TC011-Verify sign-in page elements presence]
test_mobile_flow[TC012-Verify email validation on incorrect formatting]
test_mobile_flow[TC013-Verify password field secure entry mode]
test_mobile_flow[TC014-Verify forgot password button routes correctly]
test_mobile_flow[TC015-Verify sign-in button disabled when empty]
test_mobile_flow[TC016-Verify sign-in with valid credentials]
test_mobile_flow[TC017-Verify brand logo routes back to home page]
test_mobile_flow[TC018-Verify oauth provider buttons render and are interactive]
test_mobile_flow[TC019-Verify input fields support auto-fill suggestions]
test_mobile_flow[TC020-Verify error banner displays on incorrect password input]
test_mobile_flow[TC021-Verify sign-up redirection link responsiveness]
test_mobile_flow[TC022-Verify sign-up password strength indicator]
test_mobile_flow[TC023-Verify email verification OTP dialog loads]
test_mobile_flow[TC024-Verify re-sending OTP code limits]
test_mobile_flow[TC025-Verify terms of use agreement check]
test_mobile_flow[TC026-Verify privacy policy scroll-to-bottom unlock]
test_mobile_flow[TC027-Verify passwords mismatch displays clear warning]
test_mobile_flow[TC028-Verify sign-up button is disabled until inputs valid]
test_mobile_flow[TC029-Verify OTP input limits to numeric characters]
test_mobile_flow[TC030-Verify successful registration navigates to dashboard]
test_mobile_flow[TC031-Verify post-login dashboard loading]
test_mobile_flow[TC032-Verify drawer navigation profile name matches account]
test_mobile_flow[TC033-Verify active vehicles count widget renders]
test_mobile_flow[TC034-Verify total routes count widget renders]
test_mobile_flow[TC035-Verify network stops widget renders]
test_mobile_flow[TC036-Verify on-time reliability stat loads correctly]
test_mobile_flow[TC037-Verify layout remains responsive under orientation change]
test_mobile_flow[TC038-Verify quick access routes shortcut button functions]
test_mobile_flow[TC039-Verify quick access stops shortcut button functions]
test_mobile_flow[TC040-Verify live transit announcement banner displays if present]
test_mobile_flow[TC041-Verify routes list screen displays transit items]
test_mobile_flow[TC042-Verify searching routes by transit line number]
test_mobile_flow[TC043-Verify search routes by destination terminal name]
test_mobile_flow[TC044-Verify route card badge matches transit class]
test_mobile_flow[TC045-Verify pull-to-refresh routes list updates content]
test_mobile_flow[TC046-Verify filter options expand and contract correctly]
test_mobile_flow[TC047-Verify sorting order controls (A-Z, frequency)]
test_mobile_flow[TC048-Verify transit provider selection filters the list]
test_mobile_flow[TC049-Verify clicking route card routes to detail page]
test_mobile_flow[TC050-Verify scroll behavior is fast and layout doesn't overlap]
test_mobile_flow[TC051-Verify route details page loads all stops in order]
test_mobile_flow[TC052-Verify route map visualization layer renders]
test_mobile_flow[TC053-Verify active vehicles markers display on route line]
test_mobile_flow[TC054-Verify stop sequence accordion interaction]
test_mobile_flow[TC055-Verify schedule timeline displays correctly]
test_mobile_flow[TC056-Verify first/last trip timing displays]
test_mobile_flow[TC057-Verify service exception alerts render clearly]
test_mobile_flow[TC058-Verify share route schedule button generates link]
test_mobile_flow[TC059-Verify save route to offline calendar feature]
test_mobile_flow[TC060-Verify quick switch route direction toggle functionality]
test_mobile_flow[TC061-Verify stops list screen renders all nearby stops]
test_mobile_flow[TC062-Verify searching stops by name or location ID]
test_mobile_flow[TC063-Verify geolocation prompt permissions check]
test_mobile_flow[TC064-Verify sorting stops by closest distance to user]
test_mobile_flow[TC065-Verify platform/bay information renders in item list]
test_mobile_flow[TC066-Verify modal popup on long-press to view stop summary]
test_mobile_flow[TC067-Verify transit icon badges match stop capabilities]
test_mobile_flow[TC068-Verify scroll loading loads next page dynamically]
test_mobile_flow[TC069-Verify favorite toggle icon toggles status instantly]
test_mobile_flow[TC070-Verify clicking stop routes to stop detail screen]
test_mobile_flow[TC071-Verify stop details screen displays stop header info]
test_mobile_flow[TC072-Verify incoming vehicles ETAs update in real-time]
test_mobile_flow[TC073-Verify facilities checklist rendering (bench, shelter)]
test_mobile_flow[TC074-Verify clicking map thumbnail navigates to live map]
test_mobile_flow[TC075-Verify schedule table loads for current transit day]
test_mobile_flow[TC076-Verify transit fare summary section matches bay]
test_mobile_flow[TC077-Verify reporting dynamic delay/issue input form loads]
test_mobile_flow[TC078-Verify dynamic details load fast on mobile devices]
test_mobile_flow[TC079-Verify stop description text has correct styling]
test_mobile_flow[TC080-Verify back navigation button functions correctly]
test_mobile_flow[TC081-Verify track map page rendering of Leaflet map]
test_mobile_flow[TC082-Verify location pin tracker follows user coordinates]
test_mobile_flow[TC083-Verify zoom pinch gesture responsiveness]
test_mobile_flow[TC084-Verify filter buttons filter markers by bus type]
test_mobile_flow[TC085-Verify live vehicle speed indicators update]
test_mobile_flow[TC086-Verify tapping stop marker displays stop name banner]
test_mobile_flow[TC087-Verify traffic density layer overlay toggling]
test_mobile_flow[TC088-Verify map behaves correctly on network disruption]
test_mobile_flow[TC089-Verify compass button aligns map orientation]
test_mobile_flow[TC090-Verify telemetry logging is triggered on map navigation]
test_mobile_flow[TC091-Verify favorites page loads custom saved stops]
test_mobile_flow[TC092-Verify renaming favorite items changes label instantly]
test_mobile_flow[TC093-Verify drag-and-drop reordering of favorites list]
test_mobile_flow[TC094-Verify removing items from favorites page works]
test_mobile_flow[TC095-Verify profile editing form works correctly]
test_mobile_flow[TC096-Verify settings theme options (dark, light) toggle]
test_mobile_flow[TC097-Verify push notifications configuration switches function]
test_mobile_flow[TC098-Verify account settings biometric login toggle works]
test_mobile_flow[TC099-Verify transit card balance check screen runs]
test_mobile_flow[TC100-Verify mobile E2E cycle finishes with pass verification]
